channel.title: GeoVision Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by GeoVision Inc. (gv).

item.title: CVE-2026-16519 · 7.3 HIGH — GeoVision GV-IP Device Utility DLL Search Order Hijacking Vulnerability
item.description: A DLL hijacking vulnerability exists in the GeoVision GV-IP Device Utility desktop application. The application loads one or more dynamic-link libraries (DLLs) from an unsafe search path, allowing a local attacker to place a malicious DLL in a locati…

item.title: CVE-2026-57278 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — GeoVision GeoWebPlayer Websocket Server connectInfo handler stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability
item.description: GeoWebPlayer (also called "Web Plugin" in the GV-VMS documentation and "WS Player" for VMS-Cloud) is an addon that can be installed with various GeoVision software (GV-VMS, GV-Cloud, ...). It creates a websocket server that expands the capabilities o…

item.title: CVE-2026-13125 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — GeoVision GeoWebPlayer 1.1.1.0 Websocket Server function vulnerability
item.description: GeoWebPlayer (also called "Web Plugin" in the GV-VMS documentation and "WS Player" for VMS-Cloud) is an addon that can be installed with various GeoVision software (GV-VMS, GV-Cloud, ...). It creates a websocket server that expands the capabilities o…

item.title: CVE-2026-57881 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GV-LPC2011/LPC2211 - unauthorized stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability (vlsvr)
item.description: An unauthenticated stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in vlsvr in GeoVision GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by insufficient length validation when processing remote login data. A remote attacker…

item.title: CVE-2026-57880 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GV-LPC2011/LPC2211 - unauthorized buffer overflow via RTSP Digest username (ssvr)
item.description: An unauthenticated stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in ssvr in GeoVision GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by insufficient bounds checking when parsing RTSP Digest authentication fields. A remote…

item.title: CVE-2026-57879 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GV-LPC2011/LPC2211 - unauthorized buffer overflow via AuthMode/AuthValue path (ssvr)
item.description: An unauthenticated stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in ssvr in GeoVision GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by insufficient bounds checking when processing RTSP custom authentication data. A remot…

item.title: CVE-2026-57878 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GV-LPC2011/LPC2211 - unauthorized buffer overflow vulnerability (thttpd)
item.description: An unauthenticated stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in thttpd in GeoVision GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by insufficient bounds checking when processing web request parameters in a specific r…

item.title: CVE-2026-57877 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — GV-LPC2011/LPC2211 - unauthorized format string vulnerability (vlsvr)
item.description: An unauthenticated format string vulnerability exists in vlsvr in GeoVision GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by improper handling of externally controlled input during log message formatting in the login proces…

item.title: CVE-2026-57876 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — GV-LPC2011/LPC2211 - unauthorized out-of-bounds writing vulnerability (onvif.cgi)
item.description: An unauthenticated out-of-bounds write vulnerability exists in onvif.cgi in GeoVision GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by insufficient bounds checking when processing HTTP request body data. A remote attacker m…

item.title: CVE-2026-57875 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — GV-LPC2011/LPC2211 - unauthorized null pointer dereference vulnerability in packet parsing
item.description: An unauthenticated NULL pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the HTTP request parsing logic of multiple CGI components in GeoVision GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by improper validation of required HTT…

item.title: CVE-2026-57874 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — GV-LPC2011/LPC2211 - unauthorized buffer overflow vulnerability (IEEE8021x_upload.cgi)
item.description: An unauthenticated buffer overflow vulnerability exists in IEEE8021x_upload.cgi in GeoVision GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by insufficient bounds checking when parsing filename values in multipart upload dat…

item.title: CVE-2026-57873 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — GV-LPC2011/LPC2211 - unauthorized null pointer dereference vulnerability (IEEE8021x_upload.cgi)
item.description: An unauthenticated NULL pointer dereference vulnerability exists in IEEE8021x_upload.cgi in GeoVision GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by improper validation of multipart upload headers when processing certific…

item.title: CVE-2026-57872 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — GV-LPC2011/LPC2211 - unauthorized directory traversal vulnerability (get_fcont.cgi)
item.description: An unauthenticated directory traversal vulnerability exists in get_fcont.cgi in GeoVision GV-LPC2011 and GV-LPC2211 V1.12 and earlier. The vulnerability is caused by insufficient validation of user-supplied file path input before the requested file i…

item.title: CVE-2026-12851 · 9.1 CRITICAL — GeoVision GV-I/O Box 4E libNetSetObj.so OS command injection vulnerability
item.description: Multiple OS command injection vulnerabilities exist in the libNetSetObj.so functionality of GeoVision GV-I/O Box 4E 2.09. A specially crafted network packet can lead to command execution. An attacker can send a network request to trigger this vulnera…

item.title: CVE-2026-12850 · 9.1 CRITICAL — GeoVision GV-I/O Box 4E libNetSetObj.so OS command injection vulnerability
item.description: Multiple OS command injection vulnerabilities exist in the libNetSetObj.so functionality of GeoVision GV-I/O Box 4E 2.09. A specially crafted network packet can lead to command execution. An attacker can send a network request to trigger this vulnera…

item.title: CVE-2026-12849 · 9.1 CRITICAL — GeoVision GV-I/O Box 4E libNetSetObj.so OS command injection vulnerability
item.description: Multiple OS command injection vulnerabilities exist in the libNetSetObj.so functionality of GeoVision GV-I/O Box 4E 2.09. A specially crafted network packet can lead to command execution. An attacker can send a network request to trigger this vulnera…

item.title: CVE-2026-12486 · 9.1 CRITICAL — GeoVision GV-I/O Box 4E libNetSetObj.so OS command injection vulnerability
item.description: Multiple OS command injection vulnerabilities exist in the libNetSetObj.so functionality of GeoVision GV-I/O Box 4E 2.09. A specially crafted network packet can lead to command execution. An attacker can send a network request to trigger this vulnera…

item.title: CVE-2026-12848 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GeoVision GV-I/O Box DVRSearch buffer overflow vulnerabilities in CMD_IP_SET command
item.description: GV-I/O Box 4E is a smart embedded device with 4 input and 4 relays output that can be controlled over Ethernet and RS-485. DVRSearch is a service running by default on the IOBox listening for UDP messages on port 10001. Any user on the network can se…

item.title: CVE-2026-12847 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GeoVision GV-I/O Box DVRSearch buffer overflow vulnerabilities in CMD_IP_SET command
item.description: GV-I/O Box 4E is a smart embedded device with 4 input and 4 relays output that can be controlled over Ethernet and RS-485. DVRSearch is a service running by default on the IOBox listening for UDP messages on port 10001. Any user on the network can se…

item.title: CVE-2026-12846 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GeoVision GV-I/O Box DVRSearch buffer overflow vulnerabilities in CMD_IP_SET command
item.description: GV-I/O Box 4E is a smart embedded device with 4 input and 4 relays output that can be controlled over Ethernet and RS-485. DVRSearch is a service running by default on the IOBox listening for UDP messages on port 10001. Any user on the network can se…

item.title: CVE-2026-12485 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GeoVision GV-I/O Box DVRSearch buffer overflow vulnerabilities in CMD_IP_SET command
item.description: GV-I/O Box 4E is a smart embedded device with 4 input and 4 relays output that can be controlled over Ethernet and RS-485. DVRSearch is a service running by default on the IOBox listening for UDP messages on port 10001. Any user on the network can se…

item.title: CVE-2026-12488 · 6.2 MEDIUM — GeoVision GV-VMS V20 GV-Cloud memory corruption vulnerability
item.description: A memory corruption vulnerability exists in the GV-Cloud functionality of GeoVision GV-VMS V20 20.0.2. A specially crafted network request can lead to a denial of service. An attacker can impersonate the legitimate server to trigger this vulnerabilit…

item.title: CVE-2026-7841 · 8.8 HIGH — GV-ASWeb Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability
item.description: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Notification Settings on GeoVision GV-ASWeb 6.2.0. An authenticated user with System Setting permissions can execute arbitrary commands on the server by sending a crafted HTTP POST request to the ASWebC…

item.title: CVE-2026-42370 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GeoVision GV-VMS V20 WebCam Server Login stack overflow vulnerability
item.description: A stack overflow vulnerability exists in the WebCam Server Login functionality of GeoVision GV-VMS V20 20.0.2. A specially crafted HTTP request can lead to an arbitrary code execution. An attacker can make an unauthenticated HTTP request to trigger t…

item.title: CVE-2026-7372 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GeoVision GV-VMS V20 WebCam Server Login stack overflow vulnerability
item.description: A stack overflow vulnerability exists in the WebCam Server Login functionality of GeoVision GV-VMS V20 20.0.2. A specially crafted HTTP request can lead to an arbitrary code execution. An attacker can make an unauthenticated HTTP request to trigger t…

item.title: CVE-2026-42369 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GeoVision GV-VMS V20 WebCam Server stack overflow vulnerability
item.description: GV-VMS V20 is a Video Monitoring Software used to gather the feeds of many surveillance cameras and manage other security devices. It is a native application accessed locally, but it is also possible to enable remote access via the "WebCam Server" fe…

item.title: CVE-2026-42368 · 9.9 CRITICAL — GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 Web Interface privilege escalation vulnerability
item.description: A privilege escalation vulnerability exists in the Web Interface functionality of GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 1.10. A specially crafted HTTP request can lead to execute priviledged operation. An attacker can visit a webpage to trigger this vulnerabilit…

item.title: CVE-2026-42367 · 6.5 MEDIUM — GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 Web Interface / ssi.cgi privilege escalation vulnerability via leak of Administrator credentials
item.description: A privilege escalation vulnerability exists in the Web Interface / ssi.cgi functionality of GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 1.10. A specially crafted HTTP request can lead to credentials leak. An attacker can visit a webpage to trigger this vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-7371 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 Web Interface / ssi.cgi reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple reflected cross-site scripting (xss) vulnerabilities exist in the Web Interface / ssi.cgi functionality of GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 1.10. A specially crafted malicious url can lead to an arbitrary javascript code execution. An attacker can…

item.title: CVE-2026-42366 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 Web Interface / ssi.cgi reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple reflected cross-site scripting (xss) vulnerabilities exist in the Web Interface / ssi.cgi functionality of GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 1.10. A specially crafted malicious url can lead to an arbitrary javascript code execution. An attacker can…

item.title: CVE-2026-42365 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 Web Interface guessable session cookie vulnerability
item.description: A guessable session cookie vulnerability exists in the Web Interface functionality of GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 1.10. A specially crafted series of HTTP requests can lead to an authentication bypas. An attacker can bruteforce session cookies to trigg…

item.title: CVE-2026-42364 · 9.9 CRITICAL — GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 Web Interface / DdnsSetting.cgi OS command injection vulnerability
item.description: An os command injection vulnerability exists in the DdnsSetting.cgi functionality of GeoVision LPC2011/LPC2211 1.10. A specially crafted DDNS configuration can lead to arbitrary command execution. An attacker can modify a configuration value to trigg…

item.title: CVE-2026-7161 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GeoVision GV-IP Device Utility Device Authentication insufficient encryption vulnerability
item.description: An insufficient encryption vulnerability exists in the Device Authentication functionality of GeoVision GV-IP Device Utility 9.0.5. Listening to broadcast packets can lead to credentials leak. An attacker can listen to broadcast messages to trigger t…

item.title: CVE-2026-42363 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GeoVision GV-IP Device Utility Device Authentication insufficient encryption vulnerability
item.description: An insufficient encryption vulnerability exists in the Device Authentication functionality of GeoVision GV-IP Device Utility 9.0.5. Listening to broadcast packets can lead to credentials leak. An attacker can listen to broadcast messages to trigger t…
